case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. KYUNG JOON JI et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-12-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT JI, KYUNG JOON DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-04-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2009 CONTINUED TO AUG-12-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE JUN-24-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND AS TO ENTIRE ACTION
